scripts.eval:classification: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json
scripts.eval:reasoning: promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json
scripts.eval:recommender: promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-recommender.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/recommender.json /tmp/pf-recommender.json
scripts.eval:cloudflare: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-class-cf.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class-cf.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-reason-cf.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason-cf.json && promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --max-concurrency 3 --output /tmp/pf-recommender-cf.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/recommender.json /tmp/pf-recommender-cf.json
scripts.eval:bedrock: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-providers bedrock --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class-bk.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class-bk.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-providers bedrock --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason-bk.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason-bk.json && promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --filter-providers bedrock --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-recommender-bk.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/recommender.json /tmp/pf-recommender-bk.json
scripts.eval:fresh: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-class.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/classification.json /tmp/pf-class.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-reason.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/reasoning.json /tmp/pf-reason.json && promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --no-cache --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-recommender.json && node scripts/merge-results.mjs results/recommender.json /tmp/pf-recommender.json
scripts.eval:smoke: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-pattern 'beginner: switching from Nespresso' --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-class.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-pattern 'beginner: switching from Nespresso' --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-reason.json && promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --filter-pattern 'cold-start' --no-cache --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-rec.json
scripts.eval:smoke:bedrock: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-providers bedrock --filter-pattern 'beginner: switching from Nespresso' --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-class-bk.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-providers bedrock --filter-pattern 'beginner: switching from Nespresso' --no-cache --max-concurrency 10 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-reason-bk.json && promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --filter-providers bedrock --filter-pattern 'cold-start' --no-cache --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-rec-bk.json
scripts.eval:smoke:cloudflare: promptfoo eval -c classification.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --filter-pattern 'beginner: switching from Nespresso' --no-cache --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-class-cf.json && promptfoo eval -c reasoning.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --filter-pattern 'beginner: switching from Nespresso' --no-cache --max-concurrency 5 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-reason-cf.json && promptfoo eval -c recommender.yaml --filter-providers cloudflare --filter-pattern 'cold-start' --no-cache --max-concurrency 3 --output /tmp/pf-smoke-rec-cf.json
